items.final_wording: Defines the postoperative surgical-wound population and supports wound dressing, cleansing, wound-healing, and structured postoperative wound-care documentation.

source.title: Surgical site infections: prevention and treatment — Recommendations
source.population: Adults, young people, and children having a surgical procedure involving a skin incision.
source.setting: Perioperative, postoperative, community, and specialist wound-care services.
source.exclusions: Exact for postoperative wound-care and surgical-site-infection documentation; partial for traumatic wounds, suture removal, and UAE pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines the postoperative surgical-wound population and supports wound dressing, cleansing, wound-healing, and structured postoperative wound-care documentation.

items.rationale: Supports postoperative wound and healing documentation for post-bowel surgery follow-up; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Supports review of suspected infection, cellulitis, microbiology context, structured wound care, and local heat, redness, pain, swelling, discharge, separation, abscess, fever, or systemic signs.

source.title: Surgical site infections: prevention and treatment — Recommendations
source.population: Adults, young people, and children having a surgical procedure involving a skin incision.
source.setting: Perioperative, postoperative, community, and specialist wound-care services.
source.exclusions: Exact for postoperative wound-care and surgical-site-infection documentation; partial for traumatic wounds, suture removal, and UAE pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports review of suspected infection, cellulitis, microbiology context, structured wound care, and local heat, redness, pain, swelling, discharge, separation, abscess, fever, or systemic signs.

items.rationale: Supports surgical-site infection-sign review for post-bowel surgery follow-up; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Supports documenting unintentional weight loss, appetite, taste, swallowing, bowel habit, prolonged illness, BMI, percentage weight loss, reduced intake and future intake risk when actually assessed.

source.title: Nutrition support for adults: oral nutrition support, enteral tube feeding and parenteral nutrition — Recommendations
source.jurisdiction: England and Wales; international evidence requiring UAE nutrition, dietetics, consent, capacity, and referral adaptation
source.population: Adults in hospital and community settings with clinical concern for malnutrition or impaired intake.
source.setting: General practice, community, hospital, nutrition, and multidisciplinary assessment.
source.exclusions: Exact for documenting unintentional weight loss, poor appetite, altered taste, impaired swallowing, altered bowel habit, reduced intake, BMI and percentage weight loss when measured. It does not calculate risk or generate nutrition support.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.2.1–1.2.6 — screening, clinical concern, weight loss, intake, and swallowing

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting unintentional weight loss, appetite, taste, swallowing, bowel habit, prolonged illness, BMI, percentage weight loss, reduced intake and future intake risk when actually assessed.

items.rationale: Supports documented weight, intake, swallowing and bowel concerns for post-bowel surgery follow-up; no decision is generated.
